chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD R.A. No.S-305 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objections For orders on CMA 353/2024 For orders on CMA 354/2024 For hearing of main case 26.09.2024 Ms. Fatima Zahara Ansari advocate for applicant. -.-.-. Heard counsel for the applicant and perused the order dated 29.07.2021. From perusal of impugned order, it reflects that the succession was sought for Account No.602033600000011 and before the trial court the authorized officer of Meezan Bank Limited Unit No.7 Latifabad Branch Hyderabad submitted his report with statement showing that no balance amount is lying in the account of deceased. On that basis, the lower court has observed that no succession certificate can be issued. No illegally or infirmity is found in the impugned order, the same is maintained. Result thereof, this Revision Application is dismissed along with pending applications. J U D G E Ali Haider
